name: Zscaler AI Guard Guardrail
description: Zscaler AI Guard provides real-time AI security scanning for prompt injections, PII leakage, secrets exposure, toxicity, and policy violations. Uses automatic policy resolution — no profile or policy ID is needed at the gateway level.

AIGUARD_API_KEY.label: AI Guard API Key
AIGUARD_API_KEY.description: API key for Zscaler AI Guard. Generate one in the Zscaler admin portal under AI Guard settings.

description.text: Scan prompts and responses for security threats using Zscaler AI Guard with automatic policy resolution.
Zscaler cloud region (e.g., us1, us2, eu1). Determines the API endpoint.
